To that end our applications and services collect, store and analyze a variety of data collected from you and your devices, including personal health related data on your mobile device.Your privacy is critically important to us. Your data is your own. We make no claims to it and will only use it according to the policies outlined below.
This statement is intended to clearly explain in human readable language what data we collect and how it is used. If after reading this statement you have further questions.
